channel.title: Books on 叶泽伟的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Books on 叶泽伟的博客

item.title: reading-2-the wealth of nations
item.description: he book emphasizes the self-regulation of the market and opposes government intervention in the economy. It also pioneered the concept of the ‘invisible hand.’

item.title: BookLog [1]: How to Read a Book 1972 Edition
item.description: First published in 1940 and immediately a bestseller, this book was revised and expanded in 1972. Its enduring relevance makes it well worth recommending even today.

item.title: Audiobook Collection: Continuously Updated
item.description: Collecting and continuously updating a rich collection of audiobooks for easy listening anytime.
